$instructions: Genie Space creation requires multiple PATCH calls. The table_identifiers field is SILENTLY IGNORED.
Tables MUST be set via serialized_space with sorted dotted identifiers.
Step 1: Create a blank Genie Space via POST:
Step 2: PATCH title and description (these work directly):
Step 3: PATCH tables via serialized_space (ONLY way that works):
Tables must be dotted 3-part names (catalog.schema.table), SORTED ALPHABETICALLY.
Step 5: VERIFY tables are attached (table_identifiers in GET is always empty — check serialized_space):
Step 6: Grant CAN_RUN permissions (endpoint is /permissions/genie/{id}, NOT /permissions/genie/spaces/{id}):
Step 7: Reference the Genie Space ID in the MAS config (agent_type: genie-space)
name: TODO Demo Data
description: Natural language interface to TODO demo Delta Lake tables

tables.$comment: List tables as dotted 3-part identifiers, SORTED ALPHABETICALLY. These go into serialized_space, NOT table_identifiers.

instructions: You are a data assistant for the TODO domain. Answer questions about TODO using SQL queries against the connected tables. Always provide specific numbers and be precise.
